title: Building Items from templates including subitems
excerpt: The way we organize our projects, we use subitems as steps for the parent item. I wish there was a way to build in those subitems automatically from a template so we don’t have to build each subitem every time we want to…

posts.author: brittanystringer (Brittany Stringer)
posts.cookedHtml: The way we organize our projects, we use subitems as steps for the parent item. I wish there was a way to build in those subitems automatically from a template so we don’t have to build each subitem every time we want to create a templated project. We have a lot of repeat projects with the same steps, but I’m having to build those subitems out multiple times a week.

posts.author: ckarpiuk (Charles Karpiuk)
posts.cookedHtml: I couldn’t agree more. I cannot believe this isn’t a feature yet.

posts.author: Mrjoelbaker (Joel baker)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you not Duplicate with updates? That should copy everything, including subitems.

posts.author: janremeyer (Janre)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @brittanystringer and @ckarpiuk ,

We have developed an app that does this exactly. You can save subitems as templates that you and your team can reuse. No need to rebuild them from scratch. The app is available on the monday marketplace:

Subitem Template Builder

Please reach out if you have any questions:

support@lenoapps.com
